requirement.description: When the rear-left door changes state, the system shall immediately communicate the updated status to the display controller.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorRL transitions from Closed (0) to Open (1).
Verify DoorRL transitions from Open (1) to Closed (0).
Verify DoorRL remains Open while door is held open.
Verify periodic transmission when DoorRL = Closed.

test_cases.expected_result: First frame reflects updated DoorRL value without delay

test_cases.test_objective: Verify deterministic DoorRL behavior across repeated state changes.
test_cases.expected_result: Consistent deterministic DoorRL value for identical actions

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorRL update does not affect other door signals.
Verify DoorRL update while vehicle is moving.
test_cases.expected_result: DoorRL update transmitted correctly during movement

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorRL status after ignition cycle.
test_cases.expected_result: DoorRL status correctly reported after restart
